span.p: Fast-burn page: short window e.g. 1h at a high burn factor e.g. 14.4x

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: AND-it with a short confirmation window e.g. 5m so a one-off blip self-clears

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Add a slow-burn alert: long window e.g. 6h at a lower factor e.g. 6x for the quiet steady bleed

span.p: Fast-burn pages; slow-burn can be a ticket or lower-urgency page

span.p: Both page; ensure each has its own runbook entry
